{{Quote|The Huhks all live in the city, sir. That's why it's forbidden—for reasons of safety.|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="marvel73" />}}
'''The Forbidden City''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lahsbane/Legends|Lahsbane]]. It was the home of the mature [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Huhks]], known for their tendency towards violence, and as such, off-limits to offworlders for their own protection. The city was built on a scale appropriate to the large Huhks, and as such had huge doors and windows. This was surprising to any offworlders that did enter the city as it seemed completely out of proportion to the diminutive [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Lahsbees]], the Huhks' more docile, immature form who were more frequently encountered by offworlders. The Forbidden City contained a treasure room that once contained tapes recorded by crashed [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Yom Argo]]. Rebel agents [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Dani/Legends|Dani]] retrieved the tapes after Argo's [[Death/Legends|death]], with Dani also stealing some treasure on the side.<ref name="marvel73" />
